{{ note.Title() }}

Author: {{ note.M().GetString("author", "Unknown Author") }}

Version: {{ note.M().GetInt("version", 0) }}

Featured: {{ note.M().GetBool("featured", false) }}

Has author: {{ note.M().Has("author") }}

Has missing: {{ note.M().Has("nonexistent") }}

Reading time: {{ note.ReadingTime() }} min

Path ID: {{ note.PathID() }}

Permalink: {{ note.Permalink() }}

{{ note.HTMLString() | unsafe }}
